footer.tagline: Game ratings grounded in child development
footer.copyright: © {year} Good Game Parent. Curascore scores reflect our independent assessment methodology.

home.hero: See exactly how a game impacts your child's <yellow>developing mind</yellow>—before they hit 'play'.
home.heroSub: Every Curascore reveals the real impact of a game. We analyze the skills it builds, the habits it forms, and recommend a daily screen time limit that actually makes sense.
home.comingSoonSub: We're reviewing games now — check back shortly.
home.featureScienceBody: We translate complex cognitive science, behavioral psychology, and social-emotional learning into one clear, reliable score.
home.featureAgendaBody: We expose the sneaky stuff: predatory loot boxes, dark-pattern dopamine loops, and toxic social mechanics.
home.featureTimeBody: Not all screen time is equal. We provide custom daily time limits based on a game's actual risks and rewards. Healthier games earn more time.

browse.title: Browse games
browse.filtersActive: {count, plural, one {# filter active} other {# filters active}}
browse.noGamesSub: Try removing a filter or two.
browse.noGamesRisk: Risk and benefit filters only apply to reviewed games.

discover.title: Find the right game
discover.subtitle: Filter by age, benefit, and risk level to discover games that fit your family.
discover.zoneRecommendedDesc: Strong developmental value, low manipulation design.
discover.zoneAwareDesc: Worthwhile but has notable risk factors.
discover.zoneCautionDesc: High risk relative to developmental benefit.

compare.title: Compare games
compare.subtitle: Search for two games to compare their Curascores side by side.

faq.title: How it works
faq.subtitle: Curascore rates games on what they actually do to a developing mind — not just what they contain. Here's exactly how every score is calculated.
faq.readyToFindSub: Browse the catalogue with filters for age, risk level, benefit focus, and more.
